title: MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
